region_mappings.provenance: computed: lesion mask intersect DK+aseg labelmap in MNI152 1mm space. source -> MNI152 dipy affine registration (mutual information), mask warped nearest-neighbour. Labelmap voxelized from the atlas meshes (nearest-region assignment within the MNI152 brain mask), so labels are the regions.json ids. role=primary when overlap_fraction_of_region >= 0.10. Registration and voxel parcellation are approximate; pending expert review. glioma extent = segmentation labels 1 (necrotic core), 2 (edema), 4 (enhancing tumor) merged.
